title: Bohemian Rhapsody
funFacts: This iconic song was recorded in 1975 and features three distinct sections: a ballad, an operatic passage, and a hard rock finale. Freddie Mercury wrote the entire song on piano and it took three weeks to record. The song was initially considered too long for radio play but became one of Queen's most successful singles. This song is a masterpiece of rock music and has been covered by many artists. It is a must-listen for any rock fan. It has been said that this song is the most played song in the world.
